theme_and_archetype.name: Swiss & High-Contrast (Terminal Retro-Futurism variant)
theme_and_archetype.description: A developer-focused dark mode portfolio inspired by code editors and terminal aesthetics. High contrast, precise layout, neon accents against deep obsidian backgrounds. Combines Swiss structure with retro-futuristic data visual motifs tailored for an AI/ML developer.

rules: Use JetBrains Mono for all Headings (H1-H4) to reinforce the developer persona.
Use IBM Plex Sans for long-form body text for readability.
Headlines (Size > 32px): MUST use tight letter spacing: tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines / Labels / Code tags: MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Font imports MUST be added to index.html or layout wrapper.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. p-6, p-8, p-12, p-24.
grids: MODE A (TETRIS): Use for Hero section. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. gap-8 to gap-12.
MODE B (CONTROL ROOM): Use for Projects and Skills. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-2. gap-6. Every pixel utilized. Card heights match.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Retro-Futurism (The Terminal Look). Deep black backgrounds with neon/high-contrast subtle borders (border-green-500/30). Subtle drop-shadow glow on text or active borders.

animations: Hover states: Neon glow drop shadow (drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(34,197,94,0.5)]) and slight translate-y.
Entrance: Framer Motion staggered grid reveals (opacity and y-axis shift).
Special: Typewriter effect using react-type-animation for main Hero text (e.g., 'Hello, I am Vansh. // AI/ML Developer').

components_strategy.hero: Asymmetric layout. Minimalist text with strong code formatting (e.g. const developer = { name: 'Vansh' }). Typing animation for role. Floating tech elements.
components_strategy.projects: Bento grid (Control Room mode). Cards styled like IDE windows with 'macOS dots' (red, yellow, green) in the top-left header. Tech stack as monospace syntax-highlighted pills. Two sections: AI/API and ML Models.
components_strategy.skills: The 'Kinetic Texture' approach. Large outline text of skills running continuously in background (react-fast-marquee), with a clean foreground grid of actual tool icons.
components_strategy.resume: Prominent 'Download CV' button styled as a CLI executable command (e.g. '> ./download_resume.pdf') with a glowing green border.
components_strategy.contact: Form contained within a mock terminal/IDE window. Monospace labels. Accessible high-contrast inputs.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with subtle bottom border (border-white/10). Links visible on desktop.

icons_and_assets.instructions: Use for UI adornments (GitHub, LinkedIn, Mail, Download, External Link).

hero_ambient_bg.description: Dark coding setup. Use as a heavily darkened overlay background (opacity 10-20%) for the Hero section to add subtle environmental texture.

project_ai_nova.description: Digital neural networks and data flow for 'Nova AI Desktop Assistant' project card.

project_ai_docgpt.description: Neon abstract lines for 'DocGPT medical chatbot' project card.

project_ml_car.description: Vibrant digital art for 'Car Prediction Model' project card.

project_ml_churn.description: Abstract purple strands for 'Customer Churn Prediction' project card.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use 'JetBrains Mono' for all headings and code-related typography.
Use framer-motion for page load reveals and hover effects.
Use react-type-animation for terminal typing effects in the hero section.
Use react-fast-marquee for a kinetic typography skills background.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements (links, buttons, form inputs).
Avoid generic Tailwind columns for layout—use the specified CSS Grid patterns.
Implement smooth scrolling using standard CSS scroll-behavior: smooth.
Ensure hover states use a subtle green neon glow effect to match the terminal aesthetic.
Do NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions; customize Shadcn components instead.
